message:
feat(python): numpy.ma.masked_less_equal wrapper parity (franken_numpy-rixr)

Add fnp_python.masked_less_equal(x, value, copy=True) as a passthrough
delegator to np.ma.masked_less_equal preserving the inclusive-comparison
(<=) masking semantics, copy-flag forwarding, and MaskedArray return
type across integer/float/2-D inputs.

Mirrors the sibling masked_greater_equal wrapper layout. Covered by one
pyo3 oracle test with seven scenarios: int64 with int threshold, float64
with float threshold, threshold below all values (no mask), threshold
above all values (full mask), boundary threshold equal to a present
value (masked because <= includes equality), 2-D input, copy=False
forwarded — each repr-compared to np.ma.masked_less_equal.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
